critique_summary: External critique (2026-04-20): RaftReachable.step bundles 5 hypotheses as abstract axioms. ~60-70% of components exist. Election model (NodeState, terms, votedFor, leader completeness composition) is the critical missing piece.

targets.notes: RT0+RT1+RT2 proved (0 sorry). CONDITIONAL: step hypotheses are abstract axioms, not discharged from concrete election model.
RE1-RE15 proved (0 sorry). NodeRole/NodeState/VoteRecord/wonInTerm/voteGranted. ElectionSafety (RE5) proved via HQ20. PR #open r150.
RE5 electionSafety proved: at most one leader per term. Merged with election_model.
NEXT TARGET (r150): Compose HQ20 + IU16 + RSS5 to prove elected leader has all committed entries. Discharges hqc_preserved.

FUTURE: Discharge hnew_cert — commit only after quorum ACK.

aeneas_status: BLOCKED - no-new-privileges container. Confirmed all runs.

lean_stdlib_notes.no_lemma_keyword: In Lean 4.28 stdlib-only, 'lemma' is not a top-level keyword. Use 'theorem' or 'private theorem' instead.
lean_stdlib_notes.no_split_ifs: split_ifs is Mathlib only. Use by_cases h : P <;> simp [h].
lean_stdlib_notes.no_push_neg: push_neg is Mathlib only. Use omega or rintro/cases.
lean_stdlib_notes.voteGranted_prop_as_bool: In voteGranted, '=' in Bool context auto-coerces via decide. Use Bool.and_eq_false_iff + Bool.or_eq_false_iff + decide_eq_false_iff_not. Use constructor for ∧ goals.
lean_stdlib_notes.open_namespace: HasQuorum.lean and IsUpToDate.lean have NO namespace. Do not use 'open FVSquad.HasQuorum'. Just import and use names directly.
lean_stdlib_notes.eval_multiline: Use single-line #eval with lambda rather than multi-line let blocks to avoid parse issues.
lean_stdlib_notes.rintro_on_and: rintro fails on ∧ goals. Use 'constructor' then solve each part separately.

findings: SOUNDNESS: Prior RSS3/RSS4 were false as stated. Fixed r130.
No bugs found in implementation code.
GAP (r149): RaftReachable.step has 5 abstract hypotheses never discharged from concrete election model.
HARDEST GAP: hqc_preserved (leader completeness) requires election model + composition of HQ20 + IU16 + TallyVotes + RSS5.
PROGRESS (r150): election_model + election_safety proved (RE1-RE15). Foundation for LeaderCompleteness.
